name: Magneto
description: Stereo four-head dTape echo, looper, phrase sampler and spring reverb. Independent playback-level and feedback per head, phase-aligned clock outs per head, pitch-quantized self-oscillation.

controls.name: DRY
controls.description: Level of unprocessed input sent to output. Stereo-preserving.
controls.detail: Mono in at LEFT appears at both outputs

controls.name: REC LVL
controls.description: Level into record head. Drives tape saturation.
controls.detail: LED: blue = muted · green = clean · amber = onset · red = heavy saturation

controls.name: SPEED / PITCH
controls.description: True varispeed tape speed. Controls delay time and pitch of repeats.
controls.detail: 8:1 range · noon = normal · max = 2x (highest fidelity) · min = 1/4x

controls.name: WET
controls.description: Overall delay signal level sent to output.

controls.name: REPEATS
controls.description: Feedback amount for heads with FEEDBACK ON. At 100% enters self-oscillation.
controls.detail: Feedback summed from feedback-enabled heads only

controls.name: PLAYBACK LEVEL 1–4
controls.description: Individual level of each of the four playback heads.
controls.detail: Zero mutes output of that head but head still feeds back if FEEDBACK on

controls.name: FEEDBACK 1–4
controls.description: Buttons. Enable feedback of each head back to the record head.
controls.detail: Green LED when enabled · Head 4 must be ON for Loop playback

controls.name: HEADS
controls.description: Three-way switch: EVEN / TRIPLET / SHIFT head spacing.
controls.detail: EVEN: 16th/8th/dotted-8th/quarter · TRIPLET: triplet subdivisions · SHIFT: +oct+5th / +oct / -oct / quarter at varispeed

controls.name: PAN
controls.description: Preset stereo panning of heads: LRRL / CENTER / LRLR.
controls.detail: CENTER enables custom per-head panning via FEEDBACK-hold + PLAYBACK LEVEL

controls.name: MODES
controls.detail: Green = Echo · amber = Loop · red = Sample

controls.name: TAP
controls.description: Two taps set head-4 delay time. Hold to enter PITCH QUANTIZE mode.
controls.detail: 50ms–15s tap range · amber LED = quantize active

controls.name: LOW CUT
controls.detail: Max: high-passed magnetic-drum response with peak

controls.name: TAPE AGE
controls.detail: Min: fresh tape · max: mildly peaking, atmospheric

controls.name: CRINKLE
controls.description: Tape irregularities: friction, creases, splices, contaminants.

controls.name: WOW & FLUTTER
controls.detail: CCW: perfectly tuned · CW: ailing transport

controls.name: SPRING
controls.description: Output mix of integrated spring reverb tank. DRY and WET feed its input.

controls.name: TRANSPORT
controls.description: Enters transport mode: buttons 1–4 become infinite / reverse / restart / pause.
controls.detail: Momentary/latch per-button selectable by power-up + hold

inputs.name: LEFT IN
inputs.description: Left audio input · use alone for mono

inputs.name: SEND
inputs.description: Insert return point — not an input; see RETURN

inputs.name: RETURN
inputs.description: External feedback-loop return, fed to record head after SEND

inputs.name: CLK IN
inputs.description: Clock to set delay time in quarter notes

inputs.name: REC GATE
inputs.description: Toggles record head on/off · mutes input to delay line

inputs.name: INFINITE
inputs.description: Toggles infinite hold (disables record head, loops last delay cycle)

inputs.name: RESTART
inputs.description: Engages restart transport · trigger-only regardless of settings

inputs.name: PAUSE
inputs.description: Toggles pause transport · speed of slowdown set by PLAYBACK LEVEL 4

inputs.name: TAP
inputs.description: CV-controlled TAP function. Follows ECHO/LOOP/SAMPLE assignment of TAP button

inputs.name: WET CV
inputs.description: Modifies WET level · sums with knob

inputs.name: SPRING CV
inputs.description: Modifies SPRING level · sums with knob

outputs.name: LEFT OUT
outputs.description: Left audio output · sums mono if RIGHT OUT unpatched

outputs.name: SEND
outputs.description: Summed input + repeats, pre record head · external FX loop send

outputs.name: CLK 4 OUT
outputs.description: Phase-aligned clock of head 4 · becomes loop/sample length clock in LOOP/SAMPLE modes

behaviors.name: Echo / Loop / Sample modes
behaviors.description: ECHO: four playback heads + one record head, four-tap delay. LOOP: head 4 becomes the sound-on-sound loop head, heads 1–3 remain delays of the incoming signal; FEEDBACK 4 must be ON for loop to play. SAMPLE: head 4 becomes phrase-sampler playhead, triggered by RESTART; tap to record, tap again to stop, third tap clears.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillation as oscillator
behaviors.description: Tape loop collapses into a high-quality sine. Press INFINITE to lock the pitch; SPEED still responds as 1V/oct over ~6 octaves (combining SPEED knob range with SPEED CV ±3V). Tape-mechanics knobs color the oscillation; an input signal cross-modulates it.

behaviors.name: Zero-latency suboctave
behaviors.trigger: SHIFT head mode + GATE to RESTART
behaviors.description: SHIFT mode sets head 3 to half-speed (-1 octave). Sending a note gate to RESTART CV realigns the SHIFT pointers on every note-on, yielding a tight -1 octave from head 3 with no perceivable latency. Level via PLAYBACK LEVEL 3.

behaviors.name: Pitch quantize scales
behaviors.description: Restricts SPEED/PITCH to musical intervals across 15 scales (Pentatonic, Minor Blues, modes, Harmonic Minor, Whole Tone, Harmonic Series, Chromatic). SPEED CV is quantized to semitones. Hold TRANSPORT and turn SPEED/PITCH to scroll scales; FEEDBACK/TRANSPORT LEDs show selection.

behaviors.name: Phase-aligned clock outs
behaviors.description: CLK 1–4 OUT emit 50%-duty clocks at each head's rhythmic subdivision and stay phase-aligned with incoming CLK IN or TAP. In EVEN: 16th/8th/dotted-8th/quarter. In TRIPLET: triplet variants. In SHIFT: 333ms/500ms/2000ms/1000ms at 1s quarter. CLK 4 becomes loop-length clock in LOOP/SAMPLE.

behaviors.name: Custom per-head panning
behaviors.trigger: PAN = CENTER · hold FEEDBACK N + turn PLAYBACK LEVEL N
behaviors.description: With PAN switched to CENTER, holding a head's FEEDBACK button while turning that head's PLAYBACK LEVEL knob sets its pan (L / center / R). Lets any stereo placement of the four heads be dialed by hand; all-centered produces a psychoacoustic stereo image.

behaviors.name: Send/Return loop
behaviors.description: SEND outputs summed input + delay repeats pre record-head; RETURN feeds back into record head. Patching both inserts external FX in the feedback path — summed to mono inside Magneto, though the dry output retains stereo. Reverb / filter / waveshaper here for evolving delay feedback.

behaviors.name: Dual split mode
behaviors.description: Splits Magneto into a mono 4-head tape delay on LEFT IN/OUT and an independent mono spring reverb on RIGHT IN/OUT. Two unrelated effects in one module; requires rack pull to toggle the DIP.

behaviors.name: Momentary vs latch transport
behaviors.trigger: power up while holding a transport button
behaviors.description: Each transport function (INFINITE, REVERSE, RESTART, PAUSE) can be set independently to momentary (red flash) or latch (green flash) at boot. CV inputs follow the same assignment (gate vs trigger). RESTART is always trigger-only.

behaviors.name: Pause with mechanical slowdown
behaviors.description: Stops tape with mechanical slowdown/startup ramp. Ramp time is set by PLAYBACK LEVEL 4 while TRANSPORT+PAUSE are active (both red). With TAPE AGE + CRINKLE high this produces a convincing dying-tape stop.

behaviors.name: Scrub audio when paused
behaviors.description: A ~1-foot scrub buffer of recent tape is addressable by the SPEED/PITCH knob while paused. Length of scrub material depends on the speed at the moment of pause — slower speeds capture more audio in the buffer.

patchIdeas.name: Clock-locked quarter-note delay
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO mode · HEADS: EVEN · CLK IN from sequencer master clock at quarter notes · REPEATS ~50% · WET ~noon · all four heads at equal level · four rhythmic echoes (16th, 8th, dotted-8th, quarter) locked to the sequencer · use CLK 4 OUT as a slower sub-clock elsewhere
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: ECHO
* Heads: EVEN
* Repeats: ~50%
* Playback 1-4: equal

Clock:

Source:

- Clock (Out) c> Magneto (CLK IN)
- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- Magneto (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)
- Magneto (CLK 4 OUT) c> Drums (Clock) // sub clock

patchIdeas.name: Tape oscillator voice
patchIdeas.patch: no input · SPEED/PITCH CCW · REPEATS 100% · tap TAP once to prime oscillation · hold TAP to enter Pitch Quantize (chromatic) · play sequencer 1V/oct into SPEED CV · self-oscillating Magneto becomes a scale-quantized sine voice with tape coloration
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: ECHO
* Repeats: 100%
* Speed: CCW
* Pitch Quantize: Chromatic (hold TAP)
* Wow & Flutter: taste

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Magneto (SPEED)
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Zero-latency sub bass
patchIdeas.patch: HEADS: SHIFT · PAN: center · mute PLAYBACK 1/2/4 · PLAYBACK 3 ~noon (head 3 = -1 oct in SHIFT) · send note gate into RESTART CV · mono synth into LEFT IN · get tight zero-latency -1 octave under the dry signal
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Heads: SHIFT
* Playback 3: ~noon
* Playback 1,2,4: 0
* Dry: ~noon

Synth:

Keyboard:

- Synth (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Magneto (RESTART) // realign SHIFT pointers
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Phrase sampler re-trigger
patchIdeas.patch: SAMPLE mode · tap TAP to record a phrase · tap again to end · patch CLK 4 OUT back into RESTART CV · sample re-triggers continuously at its own loop length — free granular bed
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: SAMPLE

Source:

- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Magneto (CLK 4 OUT) t> Magneto (RESTART) // continuous re-trigger
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- Magneto (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Sound-on-sound looper
patchIdeas.patch: LOOP mode · FEEDBACK 4 ON (required for loop playback) · PLAYBACK 4 ~noon · REPEATS ~70% for evolving layers · tap TAP to splice in, tap to splice out and begin playback · layer new material on top each pass
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: LOOP
* Feedback 4: ON
* Playback 4: ~noon
* Repeats: ~70%

Source:

- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- Magneto (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: External FX in feedback loop
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO mode · patch SEND → external filter or reverb → RETURN · REPEATS ~60% · the filter now colors every repeat pass (not just the output) — repeats progressively band-limited, darkened or resonant as they decay
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: ECHO
* Repeats: ~60%

Filter:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Magneto (SEND) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> Magneto (RETURN) // external feedback insert
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Dying tape stop
patchIdeas.patch: TAPE AGE CW · CRINKLE CW · WOW & FLUTTER CW · gate into PAUSE CV (latch) · hold TRANSPORT+PAUSE and turn PLAYBACK 4 to set slowdown time · gate high pauses tape with a long mechanical spin-down
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Tape Age: CW
* Crinkle: CW
* Wow & Flutter: CW

Source:

Gate:

- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- Gate (Out) g> Magneto (PAUSE)
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Dual split: mono delay + spring
patchIdeas.patch: DIP S2 ON (rear) · LEFT IN/OUT acts as a mono 4-head delay · RIGHT IN/OUT is an independent mono spring · run drums through LEFT for tape echo and vocal through RIGHT for spring — two unrelated FX from one module
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* DIP S2: ON (dual split)

Drums:

Vocal:

- Drums (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN) // mono delay
- Vocal (Out) -> Magneto (RIGHT IN) // mono spring
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (Drum FX)
- Magneto (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (Vocal FX)

patchIdeas.name: Multi-tap rhythm generator
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO + EVEN · CLK 1 OUT → drum 1 trigger · CLK 2 OUT → drum 2 · CLK 3 OUT → hat · CLK 4 OUT → kick · incoming CLK IN at quarter notes becomes four locked subdivisions driving a four-voice rhythm, phase-aligned to the source clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: ECHO
* Heads: EVEN

Clock:

Drum1:

Drum2:

Hat:

Kick:

- Clock (Out) c> Magneto (CLK IN)
- Magneto (CLK 1 OUT) t> Hat (Trig) // 16th
- Magneto (CLK 2 OUT) t> Drum2 (Trig) // 8th
- Magneto (CLK 3 OUT) t> Drum1 (Trig) // dotted 8th
- Magneto (CLK 4 OUT) t> Kick (Trig) // quarter

patchIdeas.name: Ambient scrub pad
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO · PAUSE engaged · SPEED/PITCH slowly swept by LFO · ~1 foot of tape rescrubs as a drone · add WET, CRINKLE, SPRING CW for cavernous scrub pad · dry source stays silent (recording paused)
patchIdeas.diagram:
Magneto:
* Mode: ECHO
* Paused
* Spring: CW
* Crinkle: CW

LFO:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> Magneto (LEFT IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Magneto (SPEED) // scrub
- Magneto (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- Magneto (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)
